subcodes.first_line: O my loving friends! The esteemed visitor, Aqa Nasru'llah, amazed his listeners with his praise and commendation of you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یاران مهربان من جناب زائر آقا نصرالله بمحامد و نعوت شما مستمعین را مبهوت نمود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love as fire, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
